violations.text: Dishes were observed in the hand-washing sink in the warewashing area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Paint is peeling in sections. The physical facilities must be maintained in good condition - smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Per interview of owner/operator the floor is scheduled to be redone in January. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 300 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Paint is peeling in sections. The physical facilities must be maintained in good condition - smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

Ambient temperature of front glass reach-in was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Refrigeration control knob was adjusted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
Front handsink is lacking splashguards to prevent contamination from surrounding food areas. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The floor and wall junctures behind/under the 3-bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

A small section of the floor under the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor is to be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
